RegisteredVisitor.title: Registered Visitor
RegisteredVisitor.description: A patron registered in the library system authorized to use the terminal.

collegeDepartment.description: The college or department the patron belongs to.

isBlocked.description: Whether the patron's library access is revoked.

VisitorLog.title: Visitor Log
VisitorLog.description: A record of a library visit check-in.

visitorId.description: The UID of the terminal session (anonymous or admin).

purpose.description: The declared purpose of the visit.

AdminRole.title: Admin Role
AdminRole.description: A document indicating administrative privileges for a specific user UID.

authorized.description: True if the user is an admin.

/registeredVisitors/{visitorDocId}.description: Collection of patrons registered in the library database.

/visitorLogs/{logId}.description: Chronological history of all library check-ins.

/roles_admin/{userId}.description: Mapping of UIDs to administrative permissions.
